{
  "task_plan": [
    {
      "task_id": "task_03_mem_overview",
      "question_ids": ["Q03_001"],
      "task_type": "react_code",
      "agent_type": "react_code",
      "task_goal": "查证内存管理实现语言/形态，收集 memory_constants、allocator_state、map_unmap_api、protection_relocation、call_path 等事实，判断属于 Rust no_std、C/Makefile 风格、混合或未发现。",
      "group_reason": "Q03_001 是全局分类题，需要覆盖所有内存管理核心事实才能判断。",
      "query": "在 kernel/mm、include/mm、kernel、include 等目录中搜索物理页帧/页大小/地址空间常量、分配器状态结构、页表 walk/map/unmap API、保护位/重定位机制，并追踪调用路径。使用 rag_search_code、lsp_get_definition、read_code_segment 获取强证据。",
      "seed_paths": ["kernel/mm", "include/mm", "kernel", "include", "arch"],
      "entry_symbols": ["PGSIZE", "PAGE_SIZE", "MAXVA", "kalloc", "kfree", "walk", "mappages", "uvmunmap", "PTE_R", "PTE_W", "PTE_X", "PTE_U", "satp"],
      "expected_evidence_types": ["definition", "implementation_body", "call_site", "usage_flow", "negative_search"]
    },
    {
      "task_id": "task_03_frame_allocator",
      "question_ids": ["Q03_002", "Q03_003", "Q03_004", "Q03_005"],
      "task_type": "react_code",
      "agent_type": "react_code",
      "task_goal": "查证物理页帧分配器是否存在、分配算法类型、核心数据结构、并发控制锁粒度。填充 Q03_002_01~Q03_002_06、Q03_003_01~Q03_003_06、Q03_004_01~Q03_004_06、Q03_005_01~Q03_005_06 等事实。",
      "group_reason": "四题均围绕物理页帧分配器，共享同一实现链路（kalloc/kfree 及其底层结构）。",
      "query": "在 kernel/mm、include/mm 中搜索 kalloc、kfree、buddy、bitmap、freelist、slab、run、kmem、lock 等符号，读取分配器结构体定义、实现体、调用点，确定算法类型、核心数据结构（如 struct run、buddy free list、bitmap 数组）和锁对象（如 struct spinlock kmem.lock）。",
      "seed_paths": ["kernel/mm", "include/mm", "kernel"],
      "entry_symbols": ["kalloc", "kfree", "kmem", "buddy", "bitmap", "freelist", "slab", "run", "lock"],
      "expected_evidence_types": ["definition", "implementation_body", "call_site", "usage_flow"]
    },
    {
      "task_id": "task_03_page_table",
      "question_ids": ["Q03_006", "Q03_007", "Q03_008"],
      "task_type": "react_code",
      "agent_type": "react_code",
      "task_goal": "查证页表结构体+walk/map/unmap 实现、API 函数名、并发控制。填充 Q03_006_01~Q03_006_06、Q03_007_01~Q03_007_06、Q03_008_01~Q03_008_06 等事实。",
      "group_reason": "三题均围绕页表操作，共享 walk/map/unmap 实现链路和锁机制。",
      "query": "在 kernel/mm、include/mm、kernel/vm.c 等文件中搜索 pagetable_t、walk、mappages、uvmunmap、uvmcreate 等符号，读取结构体定义、函数实现体、调用点，并查找页表修改路径中的锁（如 proc.lock、kmem.lock）或关中断操作。",
      "seed_paths": ["kernel/mm", "include/mm", "kernel"],
      "entry_symbols": ["pagetable_t", "walk", "mappages", "uvmunmap", "uvmcreate", "PTE", "satp"],
      "expected_evidence_types": ["definition", "implementation_body", "call_site", "usage_flow"]
    },
    {
      "task_id": "task_03_address_space",
      "question_ids": ["Q03_009"],
      "task_type": "react_code",
      "agent_type": "react_code",
      "task_goal": "查证内核与用户地址空间关系，判断是独立页表、共享页表还是仅内核态。填充 Q03_009_01~Q03_009_06 事实。",
      "group_reason": "Q03_009 独立成题，需要查证页表切换/共享机制。",
      "query": "在 kernel、include、arch 目录中搜索 satp 切换、CR3 切换、用户页表创建/加载、内核映射常驻等代码，读取进程切换时页表基址寄存器的赋值逻辑。",
      "seed_paths": ["kernel", "include", "arch"],
      "entry_symbols": ["satp", "w_satp", "kvminithart", "uvmswitch", "proc_pagetable"],
      "expected_evidence_types": ["definition", "implementation_body", "call_site", "usage_flow"]
    },
    {
      "task_id": "task_03_page_fault",
      "question_ids": ["Q03_010", "Q03_011"],
      "task_type": "react_code",
      "agent_type": "react_code",
      "task_goal": "查证缺页异常处理逻辑及完整链路。填充 Q03_010_01~Q03_010_06、Q03_011_01~Q03_011_06 事实。",
      "group_reason": "两题均围绕缺页异常，共享 trap→handle_page_fault→alloc→map 链路。",
      "query": "在 kernel/trap.c、kernel/vm.c、kernel/memlayout.h 中搜索 handle_page_fault、usertrap、scause、STORE_PAGE_FAULT、LOAD_PAGE_FAULT 等符号，读取异常入口、缺页处理函数、页帧分配和映射建立代码。",
      "seed_paths": ["kernel/trap", "kernel/mm", "kernel/vm.c", "include"],
      "entry_symbols": ["handle_page_fault", "usertrap", "scause", "kalloc", "mappages", "uvmalloc"],
      "expected_evidence_types": ["definition", "implementation_body", "call_site", "usage_flow"]
    },
    {
      "task_id": "task_03_cow_lazy",
      "question_ids": ["Q03_012", "Q03_013"],
      "task_type": "react_code",
      "agent_type": "react_code",
      "task_goal": "查证写时复制 (CoW) 和惰性分配 (Lazy Allocation) 实现。填充 Q03_012_01~Q03_012_06、Q03_013_01~Q03_013_06 事实。",
      "group_reason": "两题均涉及缺页时的特殊分配策略，共享 fault 处理路径。",
      "query": "在 kernel/vm.c、kernel/trap.c、kernel/proc.c 中搜索 cow、lazy、fork、uvmcopy、sbrk、alloc 等符号，读取 fork 时页表复制、缺页时 CoW 处理、sbrk 懒分配等代码。",
      "seed_paths": ["kernel/vm.c", "kernel/trap.c", "kernel/proc.c", "include"],
      "entry_symbols": ["uvmcopy", "cow", "lazy", "sbrk", "alloc", "fork"],
      "expected_evidence_types": ["definition", "implementation_body", "call_site", "usage_flow"]
    },
    {
      "task_id": "task_03_swap",
      "question_ids": ["Q03_014", "Q03_021", "Q03_022", "Q03_034"],
      "task_type": "react_code",
      "agent_type": "react_code",
      "task_goal": "查证 swap、页面置换算法、工作集模型、清理策略。填充 Q03_014_01~Q03_014_06、Q03_021_01~Q03_021_06、Q03_022_01~Q03_022_06、Q03_034_01~Q03_034_06 事实。",
      "group_reason": "四题均围绕 swap/页面置换/工作集/清理策略，共享后备存储、换入换出路径和 victim 选择逻辑。",
      "query": "在 kernel/mm、kernel/vm.c、kernel/fs、include 中搜索 swap、swap_in、swap_out、pageout、reclaim、evict、LRU、Clock、FIFO、swapfile、working_set、thrash、resident、kswapd、writeback 等符号，读取相关结构体和实现。",
      "seed_paths": ["kernel/mm", "kernel/vm.c", "kernel/fs", "include"],
      "entry_symbols": ["swap", "swap_in", "swap_out", "pageout", "reclaim", "evict", "LRU", "Clock", "FIFO", "swapfile", "working_set", "thrash", "resident", "kswapd", "writeback"],
      "expected_evidence_types": ["definition", "implementation_body", "call_site", "usage_flow", "negative_search"]
    },
    {
      "task_id": "task_03_mmap",
      "question_ids": ["Q03_015"],
      "task_type": "react_code",
      "agent_type": "react_code",
      "task_goal": "查证 mmap 实现，包括 syscall 入口、参数解析、VMA 管理、fault 路径、清理。填充 Q03_015_01~Q03_015_06 事实。",
      "group_reason": "Q03_015 独立成题，需要完整 mmap 链路证据。",
      "query": "在 kernel/syscall.c、kernel/sysfile.c、kernel/vm.c、kernel/proc.c、include 中搜索 mmap、munmap、MAP_FIXED、MAP_ANON、MAP_SHARED、VMA、vma 等符号，读取 sys_mmap 实现、VMA 结构体定义、fault 时根据 VMA 分配页的代码。",
      "seed_paths": ["kernel/syscall.c", "kernel/sysfile.c", "kernel/vm.c", "kernel/proc.c", "include"],
      "entry_symbols": ["mmap", "munmap", "MAP_FIXED", "MAP_ANON", "MAP_SHARED", "VMA", "vma"],
      "expected_evidence_types": ["definition", "implementation_body", "call_site", "usage_flow"]
    },
    {
      "task_id": "task_03_page_cache",
      "question_ids": ["Q03_016", "Q03_017"],
      "task_type": "react_code",
      "agent_type": "react_code",
      "task_goal": "查证 Page Cache 和脏页回写机制。填充 Q03_016_01~Q03_016_07、Q03_017_01~Q03_017_06 事实。",
      "group_reason": "两题均围绕文件页缓存，共享 page_cache/address_space 结构和 writeback 路径。",
      "query": "在 kernel/fs、kernel/mm、include 中搜索 page_cache、address_space、inode、pgoff、buffer cache、block cache、dirty、writeback 等符号，读取缓存结构体定义、key 粒度、dirty 标记和回写函数。",
      "seed_paths": ["kernel/fs", "kernel/mm", "include"],
      "entry_symbols": ["page_cache", "address_space", "inode", "pgoff", "buffer cache", "block cache", "dirty", "writeback"],
      "expected_evidence_types": ["definition", "implementation_body", "call_site", "usage_flow", "negative_search"]
    },
    {
      "task_id": "task_03_tlb",
      "question_ids": ["Q03_018", "Q03_019"],
      "task_type": "react_code",
      "agent_type": "react_code",
      "task_goal": "查证 TLB 射击机制和本地 TLB 刷新指令/函数。填充 Q03_018_01~Q03_018_06、Q03_019_01~Q03_019_06 事实。",
      "group_reason": "两题均围绕 TLB 刷新，共享本地 flush 和远程 shootdown 路径。",
      "query": "在 kernel、arch、include 中搜索 sfence.vma、sfence、tlbi、invlpg、flush_tlb、shootdown、IPI、remote、hart、cpu、asid、satp 等符号，读取本地 flush 封装函数、页表修改后调用 flush 的代码、IPI 发送和远程 handler。",
      "seed_paths": ["kernel", "arch", "include"],
      "entry_symbols": ["sfence.vma", "sfence", "tlbi", "invlpg", "flush_tlb", "shootdown", "IPI", "remote", "hart", "cpu", "asid", "satp"],
      "expected_evidence_types": ["definition", "implementation_body", "call_site", "usage_flow", "negative_search"]
    },
    {
      "task_id": "task_03_user_ptr_check",
      "question_ids": ["Q03_020"],
      "task_type": "react_code",
      "agent_type": "react_code",
      "task_goal": "查证用户指针安全检查机制。填充 Q03_020_01~Q03_020_06 事实。",
      "group_reason": "Q03_020 独立成题，需要查证 access_ok/verify_area/copyin/copyout 等实现。",
      "query": "在 kernel、include 中搜索 access_ok、verify_area、copyin、copyout、UserInPtr 等符号，读取校验逻辑和调用点。",
      "seed_paths": ["kernel", "include"],
      "entry_symbols": ["access_ok", "verify_area", "copyin", "copyout", "UserInPtr"],
      "expected_evidence_types": ["definition", "implementation_body", "call_site", "usage_flow"]
    },
    {
      "task_id": "task_03_mem_constants",
      "question_ids": ["Q03_023"],
      "task_type": "react_code",
      "agent_type": "react_code",
      "task_goal": "查证物理内存总量、页大小、虚拟地址空间位数。填充 Q03_023_01~Q03_023_06 事实。",
      "group_reason": "Q03_023 独立成题，需要从代码常量/链接脚本/配置中提取数值。",
      "query": "在 kernel、include、linker 脚本中搜索 PHYSTOP、PGSIZE、MAXVA、VA_BITS、MEMORY_SIZE 等常量定义，读取链接脚本中的内存布局。",
      "seed_paths": ["kernel", "include", "linker"],
      "entry_symbols": ["PHYSTOP", "PGSIZE", "MAXVA", "VA_BITS", "MEMORY_SIZE"],
      "expected_evidence_types": ["definition", "implementation_body"]
    },
    {
      "task_id": "task_03_mem_protection",

      "task_type": "react_code",

      "query": "在 kernel/mm、include、kernel/trap.c 中搜索 PTE_R、PTE_W、PTE_X、PTE_U、copyin、copyout、access_ok 等符号，读取页表权限位定义和用户指针检查代码。",
      "seed_paths": ["kernel/mm", "include", "kernel/trap.c"],
      "entry_symbols": ["PTE_R", "PTE_W", "PTE_X", "PTE_U", "copyin", "copyout", "access_ok"],
      "expected_evidence_types": ["definition", "implementation_body", "call_site", "usage_flow"]
    },
    {
      "task_id": "task_03_logical_org",
      "question_ids": ["Q03_025"],
      "task_type": "react_code",
      "agent_type": "react_code",

      "group_reason": "Q03_025 独立成题，需要查证 VMA 结构体。",
      "query": "在 kernel/proc.c、kernel/vm.c、include 中搜索 VMA、vma、vm_area、mmap_area、text、data、heap、stack 等符号，读取地址空间管理结构体定义。",
      "seed_paths": ["kernel/proc.c", "kernel/vm.c", "include"],
      "entry_symbols": ["VMA", "vma", "vm_area", "mmap_area"],
      "expected_evidence_types": ["definition", "implementation_body"]
    },
    {
      "task_id": "task_03_segmentation",
      "question_ids": ["Q03_026"],
      "task_type": "react_code",

      "entry_symbols": ["GDT", "LDT", "segment", "segmentation", "cs", "ds", "es", "ss"],

    {
      "task_id": "task_03_vm_policies",
      "question_ids": ["Q03_027", "Q03_028", "Q03_029", "Q03_031", "Q03_032", "Q03_033"],
      "task_type": "react_code",
      "agent_type": "react_code",
      "task_goal": "查证取页策略、放置策略、驻留集管理、碎片类型、地址重定位、置换作用域。填充 Q03_027_01~Q03_027_06、Q03_028_01~Q03_028_06、Q03_029_01~Q03_029_06、Q03_031_01~Q03_031_06、Q03_032_01~Q03_032_06、Q03_033_01~Q03_033_06 事实。",
      "group_reason": "六题均涉及 Stallings Ch8 虚拟内存策略，共享 VM 实现上下文。",
      "query": "在 kernel/vm.c、kernel/proc.c、kernel/trap.c、include 中搜索 demand paging、lazy allocation、prepaging、mmap_base、first fit、best fit、working set、thrash、resident、OOM、kswapd、load control、internal fragmentation、external fragmentation、relocation、compile-time、load-time、run-time、global replacement、local replacement 等关键词，读取相关实现。",

      "entry_symbols": ["demand", "lazy", "prepaging", "mmap_base", "first fit", "best fit", "working_set", "thrash", "resident", "OOM", "kswapd", "load control", "fragmentation", "relocation", "global", "local"],
      "expected_evidence_types": ["definition", "implementation_body", "call_site", "usage_flow", "negative_search"]
    },
    {
      "task_id": "task_03_main_chain",
      "question_ids": ["Q03_030"],
      "task_type": "react_code",
      "agent_type": "react_code",
      "task_goal": "绘制内存主链路 Mermaid 图，从最强入口到页表/物理页分配核心点。填充 Q03_030_01~Q03_030_06 事实。",
      "group_reason": "Q03_030 独立成题，需要综合之前所有证据绘制链路。",
      "query": "基于前序任务收集的证据，确定最强内存入口（如缺页处理、mmap、brk），追踪到页表操作（walk/mappages）或物理页分配（kalloc），列出 3-6 个关键节点，格式为 FuncName [path:line]。",

      "expected_evidence_types": ["definition", "implementation_body", "call_site", "usage_flow"]

  ]
}

task_plan.task_goal: 查证内存管理实现语言/形态，收集 memory_constants、allocator_state、map_unmap_api、protection_relocation、call_path 等事实，判断属于 Rust no_std、C/Makefile 风格、混合或未发现。
task_plan.group_reason: Q03_001 是全局分类题，需要覆盖所有内存管理核心事实才能判断。
task_plan.query: 在 kernel/mm、include/mm、kernel、include 等目录中搜索物理页帧/页大小/地址空间常量、分配器状态结构、页表 walk/map/unmap API、保护位/重定位机制，并追踪调用路径。使用 rag_search_code、lsp_get_definition、read_code_segment 获取强证据。

task_plan.group_reason: 四题均围绕物理页帧分配器，共享同一实现链路（kalloc/kfree 及其底层结构）。
task_plan.query: 在 kernel/mm、include/mm 中搜索 kalloc、kfree、buddy、bitmap、freelist、slab、run、kmem、lock 等符号，读取分配器结构体定义、实现体、调用点，确定算法类型、核心数据结构（如 struct run、buddy free list、bitmap 数组）和锁对象（如 struct spinlock kmem.lock）。

task_plan.group_reason: 三题均围绕页表操作，共享 walk/map/unmap 实现链路和锁机制。
task_plan.query: 在 kernel/mm、include/mm、kernel/vm.c 等文件中搜索 pagetable_t、walk、mappages、uvmunmap、uvmcreate 等符号，读取结构体定义、函数实现体、调用点，并查找页表修改路径中的锁（如 proc.lock、kmem.lock）或关中断操作。

task_plan.task_goal: 查证内核与用户地址空间关系，判断是独立页表、共享页表还是仅内核态。填充 Q03_009_01~Q03_009_06 事实。
task_plan.group_reason: Q03_009 独立成题，需要查证页表切换/共享机制。
task_plan.query: 在 kernel、include、arch 目录中搜索 satp 切换、CR3 切换、用户页表创建/加载、内核映射常驻等代码，读取进程切换时页表基址寄存器的赋值逻辑。

task_plan.group_reason: 两题均围绕缺页异常，共享 trap→handle_page_fault→alloc→map 链路。
task_plan.query: 在 kernel/trap.c、kernel/vm.c、kernel/memlayout.h 中搜索 handle_page_fault、usertrap、scause、STORE_PAGE_FAULT、LOAD_PAGE_FAULT 等符号，读取异常入口、缺页处理函数、页帧分配和映射建立代码。

task_plan.task_goal: 查证写时复制 (CoW) 和惰性分配 (Lazy Allocation) 实现。填充 Q03_012_01~Q03_012_06、Q03_013_01~Q03_013_06 事实。
task_plan.group_reason: 两题均涉及缺页时的特殊分配策略，共享 fault 处理路径。
task_plan.query: 在 kernel/vm.c、kernel/trap.c、kernel/proc.c 中搜索 cow、lazy、fork、uvmcopy、sbrk、alloc 等符号，读取 fork 时页表复制、缺页时 CoW 处理、sbrk 懒分配等代码。

task_plan.group_reason: 四题均围绕 swap/页面置换/工作集/清理策略，共享后备存储、换入换出路径和 victim 选择逻辑。
task_plan.query: 在 kernel/mm、kernel/vm.c、kernel/fs、include 中搜索 swap、swap_in、swap_out、pageout、reclaim、evict、LRU、Clock、FIFO、swapfile、working_set、thrash、resident、kswapd、writeback 等符号，读取相关结构体和实现。

task_plan.task_goal: 查证 mmap 实现，包括 syscall 入口、参数解析、VMA 管理、fault 路径、清理。填充 Q03_015_01~Q03_015_06 事实。
task_plan.group_reason: Q03_015 独立成题，需要完整 mmap 链路证据。
task_plan.query: 在 kernel/syscall.c、kernel/sysfile.c、kernel/vm.c、kernel/proc.c、include 中搜索 mmap、munmap、MAP_FIXED、MAP_ANON、MAP_SHARED、VMA、vma 等符号，读取 sys_mmap 实现、VMA 结构体定义、fault 时根据 VMA 分配页的代码。

task_plan.group_reason: 两题均围绕文件页缓存，共享 page_cache/address_space 结构和 writeback 路径。
task_plan.query: 在 kernel/fs、kernel/mm、include 中搜索 page_cache、address_space、inode、pgoff、buffer cache、block cache、dirty、writeback 等符号，读取缓存结构体定义、key 粒度、dirty 标记和回写函数。

task_plan.task_goal: 查证 TLB 射击机制和本地 TLB 刷新指令/函数。填充 Q03_018_01~Q03_018_06、Q03_019_01~Q03_019_06 事实。
task_plan.group_reason: 两题均围绕 TLB 刷新，共享本地 flush 和远程 shootdown 路径。
task_plan.query: 在 kernel、arch、include 中搜索 sfence.vma、sfence、tlbi、invlpg、flush_tlb、shootdown、IPI、remote、hart、cpu、asid、satp 等符号，读取本地 flush 封装函数、页表修改后调用 flush 的代码、IPI 发送和远程 handler。

task_plan.task_goal: 查证用户指针安全检查机制。填充 Q03_020_01~Q03_020_06 事实。
task_plan.group_reason: Q03_020 独立成题，需要查证 access_ok/verify_area/copyin/copyout 等实现。
task_plan.query: 在 kernel、include 中搜索 access_ok、verify_area、copyin、copyout、UserInPtr 等符号，读取校验逻辑和调用点。

task_plan.task_goal: 查证物理内存总量、页大小、虚拟地址空间位数。填充 Q03_023_01~Q03_023_06 事实。
task_plan.group_reason: Q03_023 独立成题，需要从代码常量/链接脚本/配置中提取数值。
task_plan.query: 在 kernel、include、linker 脚本中搜索 PHYSTOP、PGSIZE、MAXVA、VA_BITS、MEMORY_SIZE 等常量定义，读取链接脚本中的内存布局。

task_plan.task_goal: 查证内存保护机制形式。填充 Q03_024_01~Q03_024_06 事实。
task_plan.group_reason: Q03_024 独立成题，需要查证页表权限位和软件指针检查。
task_plan.query: 在 kernel/mm、include、kernel/trap.c 中搜索 PTE_R、PTE_W、PTE_X、PTE_U、copyin、copyout、access_ok 等符号，读取页表权限位定义和用户指针检查代码。

task_plan.task_goal: 查证进程地址空间逻辑组织（VMA/区间表）。填充 Q03_025_01~Q03_025_06 事实。
task_plan.group_reason: Q03_025 独立成题，需要查证 VMA 结构体。
task_plan.query: 在 kernel/proc.c、kernel/vm.c、include 中搜索 VMA、vma、vm_area、mmap_area、text、data、heap、stack 等符号，读取地址空间管理结构体定义。

task_plan.task_goal: 查证是否存在硬件分段机制。填充 Q03_026_01~Q03_026_06 事实。
task_plan.group_reason: Q03_026 独立成题，需要查证 GDT/LDT 或等价段描述符。
task_plan.query: 在 kernel、arch、include 中搜索 GDT、LDT、segment、segmentation、cs、ds、es、ss 等符号，读取段描述符定义和加载代码。

task_plan.group_reason: 六题均涉及 Stallings Ch8 虚拟内存策略，共享 VM 实现上下文。
task_plan.query: 在 kernel/vm.c、kernel/proc.c、kernel/trap.c、include 中搜索 demand paging、lazy allocation、prepaging、mmap_base、first fit、best fit、working set、thrash、resident、OOM、kswapd、load control、internal fragmentation、external fragmentation、relocation、compile-time、load-time、run-time、global replacement、local replacement 等关键词，读取相关实现。

task_plan.task_goal: 绘制内存主链路 Mermaid 图，从最强入口到页表/物理页分配核心点。填充 Q03_030_01~Q03_030_06 事实。
task_plan.group_reason: Q03_030 独立成题，需要综合之前所有证据绘制链路。
task_plan.query: 基于前序任务收集的证据，确定最强内存入口（如缺页处理、mmap、brk），追踪到页表操作（walk/mappages）或物理页分配（kalloc），列出 3-6 个关键节点，格式为 FuncName [path:line]。
